jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Tanishq
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Tanishq in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!
